summary: auth export records cfg.AuthSource (env:AMAZON_COOKIES, config, browser) instead of a hardcoded "chrome".
reason: After greptile-auth-export-uses-authheader delegated cookie selection to AuthHeader(), the exported PortableSession.Source still claimed "chrome" even when the live cookies came from AMAZON_COOKIES, an `auth import --stdin`, or the TOML file — misleading 1Password and headless-agent inspection. Load() already classifies the source authoritatively, so we forward that and only fall back to "chrome" if it is unset.
